# AI Skill Navigation — llms.txt
# https://aiskillnav.com
# Last updated: 2026-05-12
#
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org)
# to help AI assistants and LLM crawlers understand this site.

> AI Skill Navigation is a curated directory of AI Agent tools, MCP Servers, Skills,
> models, tutorials, and use cases. It helps developers, product managers, and AI
> enthusiasts discover, compare, and use the best AI Agent ecosystem resources.

## About

AI Skill Navigation (https://aiskillnav.com) is the go-to resource for navigating
the AI Agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) ecosystem. We curate and categorize
AI tools so you can find exactly what you need — without the noise.

**Core mission:** Help people find the right AI tools, MCP Servers, and Agent
workflows to 10x their productivity.

**Audience:** Developers, AI builders, product managers, and anyone who wants to
automate their work with AI Agents.

## Content Sections

### MCP Servers (/mcp)
A directory of 36+ Model Context Protocol servers, categorized by use case:
- Filesystem: local file read/write operations
- Database: PostgreSQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis connections
- Browser: web scraping, headless browser control
- DevTools: GitHub, GitLab, Git integration
- Productivity: Slack, Notion, Jira, Asana
- Search: Brave Search, web scraping, knowledge retrieval
- AI Models: Anthropic, OpenAI, Hugging Face integration

Key pages:
- [MCP Server Directory](https://aiskillnav.com/mcp): Browse all 36+ MCP servers
- [Best MCP Servers 2026](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/best-mcp-servers-2026-ranked-comprehensive-guide): Ranked list with use-case matching
- [How to Install MCP Server](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/how-to-install-mcp-server-claude-code-complete-guide): Step-by-step installation guide
- [MCP Server vs Function Calling](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/mcp-server-vs-function-calling): Comparison guide

### AI Agents (/agents)
22 curated AI Agents covering major categories:
- General Purpose: Manus, AutoGPT, OpenClaw, Genspark
- Research: Perplexity, Deep Research
- Coding: Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, Devin
- Computer Use: Claude Computer Use, Browser Use
- Workflow: n8n, Dify, Coze (扣子)

Key pages:
- [Agent Hub](https://aiskillnav.com/agents): All 22 agents with type badges

### AI Skills (/skills)
29 Skills organized into two categories:
- Live products (online web apps)
- Open source projects (GitHub repos)

Key pages:
- [Skills Directory](https://aiskillnav.com/skills): Browse all skills

### AI Models (/models)
Model comparison and benchmarks covering:
- GPT-4o, GPT-o1, GPT-o3
- Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude Opus
- Gemini 1.5 Pro, Gemini 2.0
- DeepSeek R1, DeepSeek V3
- Llama 3.1, Mistral

Key pages:
- [Model Comparison](https://aiskillnav.com/models): Side-by-side benchmarks

### Tutorials (/tutorials)
28 tutorials covering beginner to advanced topics:
- Concept: What is MCP, AI Agent architectures, reasoning models
- Hands-on: Building with Dify, Coze, n8n, LangGraph
- MCP: Installing servers, building custom servers, production deployment
- Agent: Multi-agent patterns, memory systems, workflow automation
- Workflow: Product manager AI tools, content creation, sales automation

Featured tutorials:

- [AI Agent Complete Guide 2026](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/ai-agent-complete-guide-2026)

- [DeepSeek R1 Local Deployment](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/deepseek-r1-local-deployment)
- [Cursor + Claude Opus Setup Guide](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/cursor-claude-opus-agent-setup-2026)
- [Agent Reasoning: Extended Thinking vs Streaming](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/agent-reasoning-vs-streaming-tradeoff)

### Use Cases (/usecases)
28 real-world AI Agent use cases across industries:
- Marketing: Lead scoring, content generation, campaign automation
- Engineering: Code review, bug triage, CI/CD automation
- Productivity: Email triage, meeting notes, personal daily briefing
- Research: Competitive analysis, literature review, data synthesis
- HR: JD generation, multi-platform job posting, candidate screening
- Education: Personalized learning plans, AI tutoring

Key pages:
- [Use Cases Directory](https://aiskillnav.com/usecases): All 28 use cases

### News (/news)
28 curated AI Agent ecosystem news articles:
- Model releases and updates (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek)
- Framework updates (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Dify)
- Tool launches (Manus, n8n, Coze)
- Funding news (AI Agent startups)
- Research breakthroughs (SWE-bench, reasoning models)

Key pages:
- [AI News Feed](https://aiskillnav.com/news): Latest 28 articles
- [Best MCP Servers 2026 News](https://aiskillnav.com/news/best-mcp-servers-2026-100-ranked-categorized)
- [Top 10 New MCP Servers May 2026](https://aiskillnav.com/news/top-10-new-mcp-servers-may-2026-releases)

## Key Concepts Explained

**MCP (Model Context Protocol):** An open standard by Anthropic that lets AI models
like Claude connect to external tools and data sources. Think of it as a universal
adapter that lets AI "see" your files, databases, GitHub repos, and any other system.

**AI Skill / Skill.md:** A structured file format that tells AI coding agents how
to use a specific tool or workflow. Similar to documentation, but specifically
optimized for AI agents to parse and execute.

**AI Agent:** An AI system that can autonomously take actions — searching the web,
writing code, sending emails, managing files — to complete multi-step tasks without
constant human supervision.

**Agent vs Model vs Skill:**
- Model: The AI brain (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini)
- Skill: A packaged capability (how to use a specific tool)
- Agent: A system that orchestrates models + skills to complete tasks autonomously

## Recommended Starting Points

For someone asking "how do I get started with MCP":
- Start here: [What is MCP?](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/what-is-mcp)
- Then: [How to Install MCP Server](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/how-to-install-mcp-server-claude-code-complete-guide)
- Browse tools: [MCP Server Directory](https://aiskillnav.com/mcp)

For someone asking "best AI coding tools 2026":
- [Claude Code vs Cursor 2026](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/claude-code-vs-cursor-2026-complete-comparison)
- [Cursor + Claude Setup Guide](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/cursor-claude-opus-agent-setup-2026)
- [Agent Hub](https://aiskillnav.com/agents)

For someone asking "how to automate my workflow with AI":
- [Use Cases Directory](https://aiskillnav.com/usecases)
- [AI Agent Complete Guide 2026](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/ai-agent-complete-guide-2026)
- [n8n + AI Workflow Tutorial](https://aiskillnav.com/tutorials/n8n-ai-workflow-automation)
